nasb.text: I, the Lord, search the heart, I test the mind, Even to give to each man according to his ways, According to the results of his deeds.

esv.text: “I the Lord search the heart and test the mind, to give every man according to his ways, according to the fruit of his deeds.”

cnv.text: “我耶和華是察透人心， 試驗人肺腑的， 要照著各人的行為， 和各人所作的事應得的結果報應各人。”

ccb.text: 我耶和华鉴察人心， 察看人的意念， 按照人的行为报应人。”
